message: Extended the `GIT_REPO_SHAPING_ENV` array in `crates/tokmd/src/git_support.rs` to include standard execution-hijacking environment variables (GIT_SSH, GIT_ASKPASS, GIT_PAGER, GIT_EDITOR, etc.). This ensures sub-process environments are hardened against unintended command execution overrides, matching the target expectations for Sentinel boundary hardening.
